question: Quand utiliser le soft delete vs hard delete ?

principles.text: Soft delete (deletedAt timestamp) pour entites owned restaurables. Hard delete pour donnees techniques/ephemeres. Jamais event sourcing pour du CRUD.

sources.name: Hibernate ORM @SoftDelete
sources.quote: Built-in @SoftDelete annotation with automatic filtering of deleted rows

sources.name: JPA 3.1 Specification
sources.quote: Entity lifecycle callbacks enable transparent soft delete filtering

sources.name: SWEBOK v4 Software Maintenance
sources.quote: Data retention policies must balance recoverability with storage costs

sources.name: Martin Fowler Temporal Patterns
sources.quote: Temporal properties track when facts are believed to be true

sources.name: RGPD Article 17 — Droit a l'effacement
sources.quote: Le responsable du traitement efface les donnees a caractere personnel dans les meilleurs delais
